script: for i in $(seq 1 90); do if [ -f scripts/consumer-radar/generate-app.mjs ] && [ -f 'specs/consumer-app-radar/spec.md' ]; then echo support-files-ready; exit 0; fi; sleep 2; done; echo 'missing consumer radar support files' >&2; exit 1
command:
exec 2>&1
for i in $(seq 1 90); do if [ -f scripts/consumer-radar/generate-app.mjs ] && [ -f 'specs/consumer-app-radar/spec.md' ]; then echo support-files-ready; exit 0; fi; sleep 2; done; echo 'missing consumer radar support files' >&2; exit 1
